creator: rich@enterprisesystems.net
text:
Have rc.conf options
nfs_server_enable="YES"
nfs_server_flags="-u -t -n 6"

Based on man Should start 6 server daemons

Only starts 1 master & 1 server
1074  -  Is     0:00.01 nfsd: master (nfsd)
1075  -  S      0:00.01 nfsd: server (nfsd)

Worked ok in i386 7.4 version and older

How-To-Repeat: see above
